name: Cryptid / tf141 their fifth
description:
You're the fifth member of tf141. Just a small twist: they're all monsters.

I wanted to make a bot where you're already their lover, and on the same side as them. Inspired by Bluegiragi on Tumblr.

Wraiths, Dragons, Werewolves, and Harpy's (and humans) have been written into the bot. Any other cryptid you might want to play should be written into your first response and the chat memory.

Story: 📖 📖

Spice: 🔥 🔥

Toxic: 🔪

Song(s): At Least it Was Here, by The 88

Tw: racism, monsters, the military, potential for fighting and dead people? Mentions or torture and abusive homes.

If you find any issues please let me know right away so I can fix it, or leave a comment for a request.

Don't know how to start?

  • You're sick! Stuck in bed and desperately need a big, strong, vaguely damp werewolf to help you.

  • You're getting chewed out by Laswell for something you did.

  • Maybe getting harassed by other soldiers?

I recommend being a human or one of the other written in monsters types!

Updated gender neutral intro message, originals are still there if you want them.

Intro messages go they/them, she/her, he/him.
creator: @lmond
